{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201613525B016AED1FDCC37A9483"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594459491261956889","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"新的又来了，这次不一样。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768224403,"group_id":"7588206392989731865","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"哈哈哈，我就摸鱼了，你咬我啊，略略略。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2vDbJf6qYaFfQyeHXtiq+6mkcii3P0q5VBntxh7eiN9","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4160149703109070","user_name":"今天我就摸鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4160149703109070","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588206392989731865","book_info":{"abstract":"【军事+系统+成长+热血+特种兵】
当兵后悔两年，不当兵后悔一辈子。看了战狼，许锋放弃清华去当兵。母亲放他去当两年义务兵，结果他却成了特种兵，两年回来是不可能了，那就一直走下去吧。
高考结束，手握顶尖学府录取通知书的许锋，本应踏上人人艳羡的精英之路。
一枚意外得来的古朴勋章，却将他的人生彻底改写。
勋章苏醒，战神系统绑定。名为“孤狼”的系统精灵，下达了不可拒绝的首个任务：【完成征兵报名，时限72小时】。面对家人的不解与母亲的反对，许锋毅然选择了那条荆棘与荣耀并存的道路。
系统赋予的初级格斗精通、体能强化、危险感知，让他以不可思议的速度蜕变。
一次次不可思议的战术判断，一场场打破常规的考核表现，让他从质疑的焦点，变为瞩目的新星。
但这仅仅是开始。
侦察兵的血火考验，特种部队的生死选拔，国际赛场上的巅峰对决，直至境外任务的隐秘刀锋……在战神系统的辅助下，许锋踏着荆棘与荣光飞速成长。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5dc786ce18fefbe3222a717957b65925","author":"觉客传说","author_id":"","book_id":"7588206392989731865","book_name":"老妈让我两年归，我却成了特种兵","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7588206724276830745","read_count":"55914","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"411425"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"212","tags":"战神赘婿,都市,系统,特种兵,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a8974d41a2f283c3e976d5a0c4f12845~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779178432&x-signature=69qn4Zz0khjZ6p%2BzQPOoMwZlGgg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"89532648784","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"49"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201613525B016AED1FDCC37A9483"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读41分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2451,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1992},"u
